milestones: solution.py exists and is syntactically valid Python that can be parsed/imported without errors
Supports multiple user accounts where each user can independently input expenses and view their own budget data
Implements category-based budget limits (e.g., groceries, entertainment, utilities) that can be set and adjusted per category
Provides a dashboard or summary function that displays group total expenses, remaining budget, and individual contributions
Includes a collaborative optimization feature that generates specific suggestions to reduce expenses or reallocate funds to meet financial goals

Contains test cases covering core scenarios (inputting expenses, setting budgets, displaying summaries, optimization) and edge cases (invalid inputs, exceeding budget limits, multiple users with different spending patterns)
